case_title: MOHAMMAD KHALIFA VS. YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC., et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. DBA YELLOW CAB COMPANY
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHALIFA, MOHAMMAD ON DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. BARKWENDE, FRANK DOES 1 TO 100
ARBITRATOR SCOTT DAVID KALKIN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION SEP-13-2004 THROUGH DEC-12-2004.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-04-2005 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHALIFA, MOHAMMAD AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. BARKWENDE, FRANK DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-20-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-21-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-05-2004

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ADR PACKAGE; NTC TO PLNTF; CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT; DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE & DECLARATION OF SERVICE BY 1ST CLASS MAIL, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHALIFA, MOHAMMAD SERVED MAY-23-2004, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARKWENDE, FRANK
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BARKWENDE, FRANK YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. DBA YELLOW CAB COMPANY JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BARKWENDE, FRANK
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-13-2004. AUG-20-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON FEB-18-2005 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES ARE WAIVED. JAN-04-2005 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHALIFA, MOHAMMAD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARKWENDE, FRANK YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. DBA YELLOW CAB COMPANY $3,790.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,790.00, STATUTORY COST OF SUIT ARE: AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF(S), KHALIFA. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHALIFA, MOHAMMAD AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. BARKWENDE, FRANK
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHALIFA, MOHAMMAD JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR SCOTT D. KALKIN
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-18-2005 IS OFF CALENDA. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
